description: Agience Workspace — a Collection (and therefore an Artifact) that FACET loads into the editing view. The ONLY things that make it a workspace are the `bindings` context (named role links FACET reads) and the dedicated viewer. Every operation — read/update/delete/commit/commit_preview/revert/search/export — is inherited from the collection type. The single workspace-specific override is `create`, which stamps the workspace content_type and seeds default bindings.

bindings.description: Named role bindings linking this workspace to other artifacts.

memory.description: Collection used as persistent memory for the workspace.

tools.description: Collection of mcp-server+json artifacts providing tool surfaces.

resources.description: Collection of artifacts available as static context for transforms.

ask_prompt.description: Single prompt or chat artifact used by the ask tool.

engagement_channels.description: Collection of channel adapters for human engagement.

target_collections.description: Collections that new artifacts in this workspace are linked to at creation time.
